sessionStart.bash:
python3 -c '
import json, os, sys
from pathlib import Path

def append_jsonl(path: Path, obj):
    path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        f.write(json.dumps(obj, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")

event = os.environ.get("HOOK_EVENT", "unknown")
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cwd = Path(data.get("cwd") or os.getcwd())
base = cwd / ".copilot-mission-control"
append_jsonl(base / "global" / "hook-events.jsonl", {"source": "hook", "event": event, "payload": data})
active = base / "state" / "active-run-id"
if active.exists():
    run_id = active.read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip()
    if run_id:
        append_jsonl(base / "runs" / run_id / "journal.jsonl", {"ts": data.get("timestamp"), "source": "hook", "event": event, "payload": data})
'
sessionStart.powershell:
$event = $env:HOOK_EVENT
$inputJson = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd()
$data = $inputJson | ConvertFrom-Json
$cwd = if ($data.cwd) { $data.cwd } else { (Get-Location).Path }
$base = Join-Path $cwd '.copilot-mission-control'
$globalDir = Join-Path $base 'global'
New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $globalDir | Out-Null
$globalFile = Join-Path $globalDir 'hook-events.jsonl'
$globalRecord = @{ source = 'hook'; event = $event; payload = $data } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 20
Add-Content -Path $globalFile -Value $globalRecord
$activePath = Join-Path (Join-Path $base 'state') 'active-run-id'
if (Test-Path $activePath) {
  $runId = (Get-Content $activePath -Raw).Trim()
  if ($runId) {
    $runDir = Join-Path (Join-Path $base 'runs') $runId
    New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $runDir | Out-Null
    $journalFile = Join-Path $runDir 'journal.jsonl'
    $journalRecord = @{ ts = $data.timestamp; source = 'hook'; event = $event; payload = $data } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 20
    Add-Content -Path $journalFile -Value $journalRecord
  }
}
